# Agent Instructions

## Project Structure
- BHD-ServerManager and RemoteClient both depend on HawkSyncShared.
- NetLimiterBridge is a standalone application.

## Agent Behaviors
- Be aware of project boundaries and dependencies.
- When editing or reviewing shared code, check for impact on both BHD-ServerManager and RemoteClient.
- For NetLimiterBridge, operate in standalone mode.
- Store all persistent memory in `.github/Memories`.
- Place all test code/examples in `.github/TestCode`.

## Review & Edit Guidelines
- Enforce or suggest consistent coding standards.
- For breaking changes in shared code, warn and suggest migration steps.
- Support manual review; user will test in Visual Studio 2026.
